Dashboard.title: PipeVision Dashboard
Dashboard.heading: Detect defects in the pipe line in a single image
Dashboard.description: RegNetPlus based model quickly classifies root intrusion, sediment blockage, and structural cracks.
Dashboard.instruction: Upload a pipe image; the prediction result, confidence level, and class probabilities will automatically open in this panel.
Dashboard.analysisOngoing: Analysis is ongoing. Result panel is about to be updated.
Dashboard.analysisPending: Graph and action advice will be prepared when the analysis starts.

Prediction.saveForLater: Save the result for later comparison.

Uploader.title: Image Input
Uploader.heading: Upload pipe image
Uploader.description: Run the model after drag-and-drop or file selection. Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, and WEBP.
Uploader.orUseButton: or use the button below to open selection window
Uploader.errorFormat: You can only upload JPEG, PNG, or WEBP files.
Uploader.errorSize: File size must be less than 10MB.
Uploader.errorNoImage: Select an image first for analysis.

History.title: Archive
History.heading: Analysis History
History.description: Review predictions saved in the browser chronologically and compare them with previous field images.
History.noHistorySub: When you save a prediction from the Dashboard screen, it will be listed here.
